query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_null_source,
  SUM(CASE WHEN photoUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_photo_url,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3PhotoKey IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_key
FROM author_profiles
WHERE photoSource IS NULL;

  SUM(CASE WHEN s3PhotoKey IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_s3_key
